docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY BANKER, JEFFREY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY BANKER, JEFFREY AS TO DEFENDANT DEHAAN, DEREK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-22-2022 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED MAY-12-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEHAAN, DEREK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-22-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-22-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM GREG GROENEVELD. PLAINTIFF JEFFREY BANKER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DEREK DEHAAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANKER, JEFFREY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEHAAN, DEREK $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
